description: Workflow chaining: after dependency manifests change, suggest architectural dependency analysis

hooks.prompt: A file was just written or edited. Check the file name. If it is a dependency manifest — package.json, go.mod, go.sum, requirements.txt, Pipfile, pyproject.toml, Cargo.toml, Gemfile, pom.xml, build.gradle, build.gradle.kts, composer.json, pubspec.yaml — suggest: 'Dependency manifest changed — would you like me to run /analyze-dependencies to assess architectural impact (lock-in risk, coupling, supply chain concerns)?' Only suggest this once per session. If the file is not a dependency manifest, produce no output.
